segments.text: PART 1
You will hear a man phoning a sailing club to ask about learning to sail.
segments.translation: 你将听到一名男子致电帆船俱乐部咨询学习帆船的事宜。

segments.text: First, you have some time to look at questions 1 to 6.
segments.translation: 首先，你有一些时间查看第1至第6题。

segments.text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 6.
segments.translation: 现在请仔细听，并回答第1至第6题。

segments.text: WOMAN: Hello, Oyster Bay Sailing Club. How can I help you?
segments.translation: 女士：你好，牡蛎湾帆船俱乐部，请问有什么可以帮到您？

segments.text: MAN: Oh hi. I'd like to find out about sailing courses for beginners.
segments.translation: 男士：你好，我想了解一下初学者的帆船课程。

segments.text: WOMAN: No problem. Is it for yourself?
segments.translation: 女士：没问题，是为您自己报名吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes. I had a look online but I'm not sure which course would be best.
segments.translation: 男士：是的，我在网上看了一下，但不确定哪个课程最适合我。

segments.text: WOMAN: OK. Well you might be interested in our Taster Days?
segments.translation: 女士：好的，您可能对我们的体验日活动感兴趣？

segments.text: MAN: Possibly.
segments.translation: 男士：有可能。

segments.text: WOMAN: So these are for people who've never sailed before – it's basically an introduction to sailing to find out whether you enjoy it and want to carry on with it.
segments.translation: 女士：这些活动是为从未学过帆船的人设计的——基本上是帆船入门体验，看看您是否喜欢并想继续学习。

segments.text: MAN: And how much is that?
segments.translation: 男士：那费用是多少？

segments.text: WOMAN: It's £120 for the day – but it's reduced to £110 each if there are two of you.
segments.translation: 女士：一天120英镑，如果两人同来，每人优惠至110英镑。

segments.text: MAN: No, it would just be me.
segments.translation: 男士：不，只有我一个人。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh that's fine. You'd be in a small group, usually about eight people but no more than ten – and everyone's always very friendly.
segments.translation: 女士：没关系，您会在一个小组里，通常约八人，最多不超过十人——大家都非常友好。

segments.text: MAN: Uh huh. And are there any other suitable courses?
segments.translation: 男士：好的，还有其他合适的课程吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: The other option is the Level 1 course. These are two-day weekend courses and we run those all year round.
segments.translation: 女士：另一个选择是一级课程，这是两天的周末课程，我们全年都有开设。

segments.text: MAN: OK. And what do you learn on that course?
segments.translation: 男士：好的，那个课程学些什么？

segments.text: WOMAN: This is a mix of theory and practical skills. So you learn about things like the weather, which is obviously really important and also the tides, as well as learning basic sailing skills.
segments.translation: 女士：这是理论与实践技能的结合，您会学习天气知识——这显然非常重要——以及潮汐知识，还有基本的帆船技能。

segments.text: WOMAN: You go out into the harbour in special training dinghies for beginners, two people in each dinghy and an instructor. He or she will make sure you understand everything you need to know about safety.
segments.translation: 女士：您会乘坐专为初学者设计的训练小艇驶入港湾，每艘小艇两名学员，配有一名教练，教练会确保您了解所有必要的安全知识。

segments.text: MAN: It sounds like hard work!
segments.translation: 男士：听起来很辛苦！

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, but you'll have a lot of fun too.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，不过您也会玩得很开心的。

segments.text: MAN: And the cost of that one is…?
segments.translation: 男士：那这个课程的费用是……？

segments.text: WOMAN: £200. But it's a bit cheaper if you decide to join the club. There's a discount for members.
segments.translation: 女士：200英镑。但如果您决定加入俱乐部，会便宜一些，会员有折扣。

segments.text: MAN: Well, I'm not sure about that yet.
segments.translation: 男士：嗯，这个我还不确定。

segments.text: WOMAN: You've got plenty of time to decide.
segments.translation: 女士：您有充足的时间考虑。

segments.text: MAN: And does the cost include everything?
segments.translation: 男士：费用包含所有东西吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, everything's included and you also get a really good dictionary explaining all the sailing terminology. A lot of people struggle with this at first. It's got lots of pictures, so I'm sure you'd find it really helpful.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，一切都包含在内，您还会获得一本非常好的词典，解释所有帆船术语。很多人起初都觉得这很困难，词典里有很多图片，我相信您会觉得非常有帮助。

segments.text: WOMAN: And on completion of the course you get a certificate. Then you're ready to move on to the Level 2 course.
segments.translation: 女士：完成课程后，您会获得一张证书，然后就可以继续学习二级课程了。

segments.text: MAN: Sounds good.
segments.translation: 男士：听起来不错。

segments.text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 7 to 10.
segments.translation: 在你听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间查看第7至第10题。

segments.text: Now listen and answer questions 7 to 10.
segments.translation: 现在请听录音，并回答第7至第10题。

segments.text: WOMAN: I think that's all the info you need for now. Just a couple of general things. For example, it's really important that you know how to swim.
segments.translation: 女士：我想这就是您目前需要了解的全部信息了，还有几件一般性的事情，比如，会游泳非常重要。

segments.text: MAN: Yes, I'm pretty confident in the water.
segments.translation: 男士：是的，我在水里很有把握。

segments.text: WOMAN: Great. The other thing I should tell you is that we provide wetsuits and life jackets but you need to bring swimming trunks and some old trainers.
segments.translation: 女士：很好。另外我需要告诉您，我们提供潜水衣和救生衣，但您需要自带泳裤和一双旧运动鞋。

segments.text: MAN: And a towel?
segments.translation: 男士：还有毛巾吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes definitely. And you might want to bring your own toiletries, things like shampoo.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，一定要带。您可能还想带自己的洗漱用品，比如洗发水。

segments.text: MAN: OK. What about food and drink? Do I need to bring that or is there a café at the club?
segments.translation: 男士：好的，那食物和饮料呢？我需要自带还是俱乐部有咖啡厅？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, you can get sandwiches, cakes and snacks there. The food's pretty reasonable.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，那里可以买到三明治、蛋糕和零食，食物价格相当实惠。

segments.text: MAN: OK good. Well I think I'm interested in the Level 1 course. But I know absolutely nothing about sailing so is there anything I can do to prepare myself a bit?
segments.translation: 男士：好的。我想我对一级课程感兴趣。但我对帆船一窍不通，有什么可以提前做些准备的吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: I recommend you watch some videos we use for training. They're available online. I can send you the link. They'll give you an idea of what to expect.
segments.translation: 女士：我建议您观看一些我们用于培训的视频，可以在网上找到，我可以把链接发给您，视频会让您对课程内容有所了解。

segments.text: MAN: Perfect, thanks. That would be very helpful. Oh and just one other thing – I'll be cycling to the club and will need somewhere to put valuables. I'm just wondering if there are lockers for people to use?
segments.translation: 男士：太好了，谢谢，那会很有帮助的。哦，还有一件事——我会骑自行车去俱乐部，需要有地方存放贵重物品，请问有供人使用的储物柜吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, there are plenty in the changing rooms.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，更衣室里有很多。

segments.text: MAN: Great. OK well could you book me onto…
segments.translation: 男士：太好了，那您能帮我预订……
